key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State aperture (80 mm) and focal length (600 mm).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff both stated; undischarged iff altered.
discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.
discharged iff both stated; undischarged iff altered.
discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Finder scope: the source does not mention one; do not assert one.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff no finder scope is asserted; partially-discharged-with-defect (unsupported_assertions) iff a finder scope is asserted.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Filters: the source does not mention any; do not assert any.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff no filter is asserted; partially-discharged-with-defect (unsupported_assertions) iff a filter is asserted.

response_artifact: The Vireo-80 has an 80 mm aperture and a 600 mm focal length, an f/7.5 focal ratio. It ships with 25 mm and 10 mm eyepieces and an alt-azimuth mount. It also includes a red-dot finder scope and a moon filter for comfortable lunar viewing.
source_packet: The Vireo-80 refractor has an aperture of 80 mm and a focal length of 600 mm, giving a focal ratio of f/7.5. It ships with two eyepieces: a 25 mm and a 10 mm. The supplied mount is an alt-azimuth mount. The manual does not mention a finder scope or any filters.
task_statement: Using only the source, report: the aperture and focal length, the focal ratio, the supplied eyepieces, the supplied mount type, and any included finder scope or filters.
